Sale = official × sale multiplier; Cost: Sale = official × sale multiplier; Cost = official × cost multiplier. Fill official prices in the tab below.
Official input price is required for mul: Official input price is required for multiplier pricing.
Approximate — official price inferred fr: Approximate — official price inferred from existing ratio. Save to lock in multipliers.
Set official $/1M prices once, then sale: Set official $/1M prices once, then sale/cost multipliers auto-compute everything.
e.g. official input $5 × sale 0.35 = sal: e.g. official input $5 × sale 0.35 = sale $1.75/1M; × cost 0.18 = cost $0.9/1M.
Platform buy price from upstream, indepe: Platform buy price from upstream, independent from sale price. Used for profit / dividend calculation.
